scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm for this repo.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prepare: node ./scripts/manage_scummvm_assets.mjs validate && node ./scripts/manage_scummvm_assets.mjs sync scummvm-shell public && node ./scripts/manage_scummvm_assets.mjs validate public
